results.title: Leveraging Large Language Models for Accessible, Multilingual, and Collaborative Corpus Analysis in Education

Expected Result: The proposed approach is expected to significantly enhance the usability, inclusivity, and functionality of educational toolkits, making them more effective for learners and educators worldwide.
